flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at College of the Desert fell 32% between 2007 and 2010 (25.1% → 17.2%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at College of the Desert rose 28% between 2007 and 2010 ($594 → $762).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at College of the Desert rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.0k → $10.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at College of the Desert rose 102% between 2007 and 2010 (4.4k → 8.9k).
